channel.title: Pages on Linus Torvalds
channel.description: Recent content in Pages on Linus Torvalds

item.title: AI 创作
item.description: Palyground AI Now has a limit of 51 images [[Midjourney]] MooValley Akool https://github.com/OpenTalker/SadTalker https://www.browse.ai/ The easiest way to extract and monitor data from any website. https://vidyo.ai/ Make short videos from long ones instantly Veed D-ID Turn Photo To Video In 30 Seconds EvelenLabs Custom AI Tensor Art Fliki - Video creation made 10x simpler & faster with AI Play HT Durable - AI Website Builder and Small Business Software Runway ML

item.title: svelte.js 登录示例代码
item.description: <script> import { onMount } from 'svelte'; import { db } from './pocketbase.js'; let username = ''; let password = ''; let error = ''; onMount(async () => { try { await db.open(); } catch (e) { console.error(e); } }); async function handleSubmit() { try { const user = await db.getUser(username); if (!user) { error = '用户名不存在'; return; } if (user.password !== password) { error = '密码不正确'; return; } // 登录成功的代码 error = ''; } catch (e) { console.

item.title: ChatGPT 创作
item.description: 人類還剩幾集可以逃？ChatGPT + Midjourney + Clipchamp AI大軍聯合玩內容創作 (文稿/插圖/配樂/配音/字幕全包) ChatGPT https://openai.com/blog/chatgpt/ Midjourney https://www.midjourney.com/ Clipchamp https://clipchamp.com/ PromptHero https://prompthero.com/ Clip Interrogator https://replicate.com/pharmapsychotic… Aiva AI Music https://creators.aiva.ai/

item.title: Obsidian Tips
item.description: Create Multiple Columns, using plugin Multi-Column Markdown Create Daily Notes in date-formatted folder Create Reading List， using plugin Book Search Setting up your own digital garden with Jekyll {{video https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=kg-9n_A4Tf0}}[Publishing your Obsidian Vault Online with Quartz](https://brandonkboswell.com/blog/Publishing-your-Obsidian-Vault-Online-with-Quartz/)
